title: tithonia rotundifolia
intro: Tithonia rotundifolia, also known as Mexican sunflower or tree marigold, is a flowering plant native to Mexico and Central America, characterized by its bright yellow and orange flowers. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its ability to lower fever and reduce inflammation, due to its high concentration of flavonoids and terpenoids. The health benefits of Tithonia rotundifolia include its potential to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its ability to boost the immune system and reduce stress. The plant can be prepared into various herbal remedies, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
